component=sqlite3-lsio-mod phase=03-swap event=skip-already-current arch=linux-x86_64-v2
component=sqlite3-lsio-mod phase=04-config event=complete
event=config-updated tag=MaxLibraryDbConnections
event=config-already-set tag=MaxAuthDbConnections
event=config-already-set tag=MaxOtherDbConnections
event=missing-element tag=EnableSqLiteMmio
Sqlite version: @SQLITE_VERSION_DOTTED@
Sqlite compiler options: MAX_MMAP_SIZE=1099511627776,THREADSAFE=2
[sqlite3-builds-obs] 2026-05-31 sqlite3_open_v2 filename=/config/data/library.db rc=0
[sqlite3-builds-obs] 2026-05-31 trace SQLITE_TRACE_STMT sql=select 1
